nodes.label: .`updateDateOfBirth with a date in the past is valid`()
.`updateDateOfBirth with epoch boundary 1900-01-01 is invalid (not strictly after)`()
.`updateDateOfBirth with a date far in the future is invalid`()
.`updateSex with Male sets isValid to true`()
.`updateSex with Female sets isValid to true`()
.`updateSex with Other sets isValid to true`()
.`updateHeightImperial with 0 feet 0 inches is invalid (too short)`()
.`isPageInputValid returns false when required field is not valid`()
.`isPageInputValid returns true after valid name is entered`()
.`isPageInputValid returns false when only one of two required fields is valid`()
.`isPageInputValid returns true when all required fields in list are valid`()
.`isPageInputValid returns false for unknown field id`()
.`isPageInputValid uses custom fields snapshot when provided`()
